sourceText:
Hello world. This is a test of the smart translation system. The system supports long text translation with streaming output. Each sentence will be displayed one by one as it is translated. This provides a better user experience for long documents.

The translation engine has multiple fallback options. If the primary engine fails, it will automatically switch to the secondary engine. This ensures high availability and reliability.

Sensitive word filtering is also implemented. There are three levels: warning, masking, and blocking. The system can detect and handle inappropriate content automatically.

History records are saved both locally and on the server. You can search and paginate through your translation history.

If the primary engine fails, it will automatically switch to the secondary engine. This ensures high availability and reliability. Sensitive word filtering is also implemented. There are three levels: warning, masking, and blocking. The system can detect and handle inappropriate content automatically. History records are saved both locally and on the server. You can search and paginate through your translation history. [译文已生成]
